allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.ftcscout.org/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ tepRecords\(season: 2025, skip: 0, take: 3000, sortBy: \\""""opr.totalPointsNp\\"""", sortDir: Desc\) { data { data { teamNumber stats { ... on TeamEventStats2025 { opr { totalPointsNp } } } } } } }""""}')
